title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the "Chief Zeb Smith Post Office".
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
crs_summary: This bill designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the "Chief Zeb Smith Post Office".
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
